repair_history.diagnosis:
line 100: Couldn't resolve reference to 'min'.: AGREE does not support the 'min' function; it must be expressed using conditional logic or replaced with a legal AGREE expression -> Replace 'min(gcas_timeToFailure, tcas_timeToFailure, geof_timeToFailure)' with a legal AGREE expression using conditional logic or a custom function definition
line 101: Couldn't resolve reference to 'concurrencyFactor'.: AGREE does not support the 'concurrencyFactor' function; it must be defined or replaced with a legal AGREE expression -> Define 'concurrencyFactor' as a custom function or replace with a direct boolean expression using visible identifiers
line 102: Couldn't resolve reference to 'concurrencyFactor'.: AGREE does not support the 'concurrencyFactor' function; it must be defined or replaced with a legal AGREE expression -> Define 'concurrencyFactor' as a custom function or replace with a direct boolean expression using visible identifiers
line 103: Couldn't resolve reference to 'concurrencyFactor'.: AGREE does not support the 'concurrencyFactor' function; it must be defined or replaced with a legal AGREE expression -> Define 'concurrencyFactor' as a custom function or replace with a direct boolean expression using visible identifiers
missing EOF at 'function': AGREE annex syntax error due to incomplete function declaration -> Add missing semicolon after function declaration on line 100

missing EOF at 'function': AGREE function declaration syntax error due to missing semicolon or incorrect block termination -> Add semicolon after function declaration to properly terminate the function statement
missing EOF at 'function': AGREE function declaration syntax error in annex block -> Replace 'function' with 'eq' for function definitions in AGREE annex

mismatched input '(' expecting ':': Invalid AGREE equation syntax; missing colon after parameter list -> Change 'eq min(x: real, y: real, z: real)' to 'eq min(x: real, y: real, z: real) : real'
mismatched input ')' expecting ';': Invalid AGREE equation syntax; missing semicolon after equation body -> Add semicolon after 'recovery_time < failure_time' in concurrencyFactor definition
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'real' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: AGREE equation syntax error prevents type resolution for timeToFailure equation -> Fix min function definition syntax to enable type checking
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'bool' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: AGREE equation syntax error prevents type resolution for p1 equation -> Fix concurrencyFactor function definition syntax to enable type checking
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'bool' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: AGREE equation syntax error prevents type resolution for p2 equation -> Fix concurrencyFactor function definition syntax to enable type checking
